instructions: Translate the following English sentence into Spanish.
sourceText: I hope you come to the party soon.
referenceTranslation: Espero que vengas pronto a la fiesta.

instructions: Translate the following English sentence into Spanish.
sourceText: When I have time, I will call you.

instructions: Translate the following English sentence into Spanish.
sourceText: It is important that we attend the meeting on time.
referenceTranslation: Es importante que asistamos a la reunión a tiempo.
